points.title: Ma Oya River Bath Procession
points.description: Witness the spectacular twice-daily march of over 70 elephants walking 0.5km through Pinnawala village to the Ma Oya River for bathing and playing.

points.title: Baby Elephant Bottle Feeding
points.description: Observe heartwarming bottle-feeding sessions with orphaned baby elephants who receive specialized care from dedicated mahouts serving as surrogate mothers.

points.title: Elephant Family Social Dynamics
points.description: Study complex elephant social behavior as three generations interact, with mothers teaching young and matriarchs leading the herd.

points.title: Conservation Breeding Program
points.description: Learn about the successful breeding program that has produced 75 captive births, including the historic twin elephants born in 2021.

points.title: Traditional Mahout Demonstrations
points.description: Witness the 70 skilled mahouts practicing traditional Sri Lankan elephant care methods passed down through generations.

points.title: Elephant Dung Paper Making
points.description: Observe the innovative eco-friendly paper production process that converts elephant waste into sustainable products supporting local communities.

points.title: Veterinary Care Facilities
points.description: Learn about specialized medical care for elephants with disabilities, including blind elephants and landmine victims who receive lifetime sanctuary.

points.title: Educational Conservation Programs
points.description: Participate in educational sessions about elephant biology, behavior, conservation challenges, and human-elephant conflict resolution.
